text.title: Financial Planning Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Financial Planning.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS founder $3.5K MRR, $1.2K burn, $9K cash.
example.trace: snapshot: cash $9K, burn $1.2K, runway 7.5 months → 3m projection (weekly) → 12m projection (monthly) → reserve 20% / reinvest 40% / pay 40% → tax estimate 22% → next review in 30 days
